reviews.comment: Well divided parcels, electricity, perfect accomodations, 24h hot water, small park for kids, common place "quincho", and lots of space to be peacefully sorrounded by nature a near the beach, low prices as well!

reviews.comment:
Cargo siempre la atención de los playeros es exelente pero no se por que no ponen mas personal los pobres pibes no dan abasto para tanta demanda y no son mas que dos atendiendo 🤦‍♂️

(Translated by Google)
I always charge the attention of the beach attendants is excellent but I don't know why they don't put more staff the poor kids can't keep up with so much demand and there are only two serving 🤦‍♂️
